why_it_matters: Tests whether the mid-loading local blockage and BTC response are robust rather than seed-specific.
minimum_success_gate: At least three valid repeats with final BTC, retention, Bmax and outlet-connected fraction.
manuscript_upgrade: Changes loading statement from single-seed sensitivity to seed-bounded loading response.
claim_if_successful: Loading mainly amplifies local deposition across repeats without measurable connectivity loss.
claim_if_not_successful: Loading response is stochastic; retain only bounded single-window interpretation.

why_it_matters: Bounds the strongest current local-blockage point and tests whether the 0.21% OpenFOAM pressure-change interpretation is repeat-stable.
minimum_success_gate: At least three valid repeats with Bmax, C_loss and pressure-handoff candidate profiles.
manuscript_upgrade: Turns the highest loading state into a seed-bounded stress point.
claim_if_successful: The present high-loading state remains pre-clogging under seed variation.
claim_if_not_successful: A subset of seeds may approach pore-network degradation; identify those for pressure handoff.

why_it_matters: Tests whether a higher inventory leaves the O(1e-5) blockage window or still remains perturbative.
minimum_success_gate: Stable transport to the same observation window; postprocessed BTC, Bmax, C_loss and candidate hydraulic profile.
manuscript_upgrade: Adds a stress-test point without claiming a universal critical threshold.
claim_if_successful: Even doubled inventory remains pre-clogging, strengthening the decoupling conclusion.
claim_if_not_successful: Provides the first candidate transition state for focused hydraulic validation.

parameter_focus: two matched Fd/W states using different df/dp and ug
why_it_matters: Tests whether drag-to-weight ratio is a useful organizing coordinate rather than a hidden size-only trend.
minimum_success_gate: Matched Fd/W cases show comparable penetration metrics within a bounded tolerance or expose a size-specific correction.
claim_if_successful: Fd/W is an interpretable first-order migration coordinate for the current DEM window.
claim_if_not_successful: Add debris-size dependence to the mechanism map and avoid compact Fd/W collapse language.

parameter_focus: worst Bmax/C_loss state selected from Phase-II DEM outputs
why_it_matters: Converts the strongest new local-blockage state into a pressure-response check.
minimum_success_gate: Passing mesh/solver logs and a pressure-drop comparison against the current baseline handoff.
manuscript_upgrade: Upgrades hydraulic consequence from current cases to the strongest Phase-II stress state.
claim_if_successful: Hydraulic response remains perturbative or identifies a pressure-relevant outlier.
claim_if_not_successful: Keep OpenFOAM as screening-only and do not use it for pressure-calibrated Ib.
